name: Savory Cheddar Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the shredded cheese in a bowl and set aside.
2. Hard cook and chop the egg, then set aside.
3. Melt the butter in a skillet over low heat.
4. Add and cook the onion until transparent; add the flour and stir until well blended.
5. Heat until bubbly; add the cream, salt, and Tobasco sauce gradually while stirring constantly.
6. Cook until the mixture boils. Cook 1 to 2 minutes longer and remove from the heat.
7. Blend in the lemon juice.
8. Add the creamed mixture to the cheese; add the egg, pimento, and stuffed olive slices to the mixture. Mix until well blended and set aside.
9. Pan broil the bacon slices until they are partially cooked and still limp.
10. Spread softened butter on each bread slice, then spread the cheddar mixture on the bread, allowing 1/4 cup for each slice.
11. Top each slice with 2 of the bacon slices, crossed diagonally.
12. Set the oven temperature to broil (500°F or higher). Arrange the sandwiches on the broiler rack and place in the broiler with the tops of the sandwiches 3-inches below the heat source.
13. Broil until the cheddar mixture is bubbly and slightly browned, and the bacon slices are crisp. Serve hot. Makes 6 open-faced sandwiches
